about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.title: Discover Your Creative Space
about.p1: Al-Marsam is more than just a space; it's a vibrant community for creators where passion meets professionalism.
about.p2: Our vision is to support creators through professional courses and premium workspaces designed for comfort and productivity.
